title: 宝塚記念の後に・さあ、コックピットへ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun overtakes her opponents at full
speed and leaves her mark on the Takarazuka
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next target is the autumn Tenno Sho! Her
desire to blow past the competition with all her
might is renewed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, having witnessed Mayano Top
Gun racing at full speed with her own eyes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian leaves the racecourse with a fire lit in
her heart.
